gpt_comment: [FULL] All accessible sources align with the baseline for Paris: sunny with an average of 24.8°C and 1% chance of rain. Meteoblue also indicates a high of 88°F (31.1°C) and a low of 67°F (19.4°C), which is within the baseline range. YR.no and local data were not available for comparison. It's a perfect day to visit the Jardin du Luxembourg and maybe spot a bumblebee or two.
